texto: Loneliness sometimes gives me a quantity of creativeness - you're drinking another glass of wine and you're feeling even worse. Art doesn't work without pain
autor: art also exists for compensating pain.
explicacao: Citação de art also exists for compensating pain. sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Loneliness sometimes gives me a quantity of creativeness - you're drinking another glass of wine …” articula reflexao, till-lindemann, loneliness em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e reflexao.
